moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week Underway
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon, is in full swing, leading up to the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals this coming weekend.

angles.name: General excitement
angles.copy: Centre Court drama, strawberries & cream... Wimbledon's second week is here! Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: London focus
angles.copy: London is buzzing with Wimbledon fever as the finals approach! Are you heading to SW19 or watching from a screen?

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: As we enter the business end of Wimbledon, can any British players make a deep run for the trophies? Fingers crossed!

moments.title: British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: Today is race day for the Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix at Silverstone, concluding an action-packed weekend of high-speed racing.

angles.name: Race excitement
angles.copy: It's lights out and away we go! The British Grand Prix is today at Silverstone. Who will take the chequered flag?

angles.name: Silverstone atmosphere
angles.copy: The roar of the crowd, the smell of burnt rubber... British Grand Prix race day is always special. Are you trackside or watching from home?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Warning Issued
moments.blurb: A yellow heat health alert is in place for much of England from today until July 11, with temperatures expected to rise to 34C in the South East by Thursday or Friday.

angles.name: General heat warning
angles.copy: Keep cool and stay hydrated! A heat health alert is in force for much of England this week, with temps set to climb. Look after yourselves!

angles.name: Southern England focus
angles.copy: Temperatures are soaring in London and the South East this week, potentially hitting 34C! Remember to check on vulnerable neighbours.

angles.name: Devon specific
angles.copy: Devon, stay cool! With a heat health alert in place for the South West, remember to drink plenty of water and seek shade. Enjoy the sunshine safely!

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancellation Still Buzzing
moments.blurb: The recent cancellation of Wireless Festival 2026, due to headliner Ye's Electronic Travel Authorisation being withdrawn, continues to be a major talking point in the UK music scene.

angles.name: Music industry impact
angles.copy: Wireless Festival 2026 might be off, but the fallout from the cancellation is still huge. What does this mean for future UK festivals?

angles.name: Fan reaction
angles.copy: Still gutted about Wireless Festival being cancelled earlier this year? The debate around the decision and its impact on festival culture is still raging.

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins next week, July 12-19, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with practice days starting today.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for some world-class golf! The Open Championship tees off next week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Practice days
angles.copy: The pros are already on the greens at Royal Birkdale for practice days ahead of The Open Championship next week. Who are you hoping to see shine?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at number one on the Official UK Singles Chart (July 2-8), with Olivia Rodrigo, Michael Jackson, and Harry Styles also in the top 5.

angles.name: Chart topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are holding tight to the UK Number 1 spot with 'Rein Me In'. Who else is loving this track?

angles.name: Top 5 breakdown
angles.copy: The new UK Singles Chart is in! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean, Olivia Rodrigo, Michael Jackson, Harry Styles, and Ariana Grande all in the Top 5. Thoughts?

moments.title: New TV Shows for July
moments.blurb: July brings a fresh wave of new TV to UK screens, including the 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' on Prime Video, a new 'Little House on the Prairie' on Netflix, and Scottish crime drama 'The Dark' on ITV.

angles.name: General TV buzz
angles.copy: New month, new shows! From 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' to a gritty Scottish crime drama, July's TV schedule is packed. What are you adding to your watchlist?

angles.name: Scottish drama focus
angles.copy: Get ready for some intense viewing! The new Scottish crime drama 'The Dark' is coming to ITV this month. Who's excited for a new mystery?

moments.title: Happy 76th to Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday today, July 5.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News hit?

moments.title: Happy 57th to RZA
moments.blurb: RZA, the influential rapper and producer from Wu-Tang Clan, turns 57 today, July 5.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only RZA! Wu-Tang Clan forever. What's your favourite track he's produced?

moments.title: Happy 67th to Marc Cohn
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Marc Cohn, known for his hit 'Walking in Memphis', celebrates his 67th birthday today, July 5.

angles.name: Memphis man
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the voice behind 'Walking in Memphis', Marc Cohn! A true songwriting talent.

moments.title: Happy 51st to 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson III) celebrates his 51st birthday tomorrow, July 6.

angles.name: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating 50 Cent's 51st birthday! What's your favourite track from the hip-hop mogul?

moments.title: Happy 67th to John Keeble
moments.blurb: John Keeble, drummer for the iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, turns 67 tomorrow, July 6.

angles.name: True Gold drummer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a very happy 67th birthday to Spandau Ballet's brilliant drummer, John Keeble! What's your favourite Spandau hit?

moments.title: Happy 86th to Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7.

angles.name: Beatles icon
angles.copy: Peace and love! On Tuesday, we're wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr!

moments.title: Happy 62nd to Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, lead singer of Hole and an icon of 90s rock, celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9.

angles.name: 90s rock queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 62nd birthday to the unforgettable Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Happy 51st to Jack White
moments.blurb: Jack White, the prolific musician known for The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and The Dead Weather, turns 51 on Thursday, July 9.

angles.name: Rock visionary
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to rock's ultimate multi-instrumentalist, Jack White! From White Stripes to solo, his impact is huge.

moments.title: Happy 72nd to Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on Friday, July 10.

angles.name: Synth-pop legend
angles.copy: It's a very happy 72nd birthday to Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys on Friday! What's your all-time favourite PSB track?

moments.title: Happy 67th to Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and co-songwriter, Richie Sambora, turns 67 on Saturday, July 11.

angles.name: Bon Jovi guitar hero
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 67th birthday to the incredible Richie Sambora this Saturday! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar solo?

moments.title: Happy 69th to Peter Murphy
moments.blurb: Peter Murphy, the iconic lead singer of Bauhaus and a pioneer of gothic rock, celebrates his 69th birthday on Saturday, July 11.

angles.name: Gothic rock legend
angles.copy: Happy 69th Birthday to the 'Godfather of Goth', Peter Murphy! His influence on rock music is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy 41st to Gareth Gates
moments.blurb: Pop Idol runner-up and chart-topping singer Gareth Gates celebrates his 41st birthday on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Pop Idol favourite
angles.copy: Remember Gareth Gates? The Pop Idol sensation turns 41 this Sunday! What was your favourite of his hits?
